name: searchts
summary: First-party web superpowers for AI agents: an open-source escalating web unlocker (browser-fingerprinted fetch -> JS-render relay -> stealth browser) for `read`, keyless multi-provider `search` with rank fusion, subtitles-first video `transcribe`, and an on-demand asset + design-inspiration `grab` (palette/fonts/assets through the same unlocker). CLI + MCP server + Claude Code skill. Keyless by default; optional platform helpers.
author: capad-xyz
